nta.declaration: clock cl; int temp; const int a = 1891; const int b = 2101; const int c = 2159; const int d = 2201; const int e = 2236; const int f = 2267; const int g = 2296; const int h = 2325; const int i = 2352; const int j = 2380; const int k = 2410; const int l = 2441; const int m = 2476; const int n = 2518; const int o = 2575; const int p = 2786;
